subject: fix(themes): improve readability of preset theme colors
body:
Review of WCAG contrast ratios revealed several themes with poor
text readability. Changes:

- Sage: swap primary/secondary (was pastel-on-pastel, now dark bg
  with light text — 10.03:1 AAA)
- Vibrant → Ruby: replace clashing purple/yellow/pink with deep
  burgundy/cream/gold jewel tone (sec 9.16:1 AAA, acc 4.67:1 AA)
- Candy: darken pink primary (#ec4899 → #be185d), white secondary,
  light gold accent (sec 6.04:1 AA, acc 4.85:1 AA)
- Neon: desaturate garish pure-RGB neon tones to softer variants
  that still pop (sec 11.36:1 AAA, acc 8.05:1 AAA)

Tags: themes, a11y, contrast, colors
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-readability
Semver: minor

title: improve readability of preset theme colors
